title: Proclamation No. 656, s. 1940
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 656

RESERVING FOR QUARRY SITE PURPOSES A PARCEL OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE BARRIO OF ANDAPAN, MUNICIPALITY OF GONZAGA, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, as amended, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for Quarry site purposes, under the administration of the Director of Public Works, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following parcel of the public domain, situated in the barrio of Andapan, municipality of Gonzaga, Province of Cagayan, island of Luzon and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Ir-475, to wit:

Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan, Ir-475, N. 81° 52′ W. 3856.18 m. more or less from S. L. L. M. No. 1; municipality of Gonzaga, thence N. 40° 54′ W. 365.32 m. to point 2; N. 34° 48′ W. 362.52 m. to point 3; N. 21° 31′ E. 260.04 m. to point 4; N. 12° 03′ E. 171.98 m. to point 5; N. 7° 32′ E. 62.83 m. to point 6; N. 78° 35′ E. 398.61 m. to point 7; N. 83° 39′ E. 140.12 m. to point 8; N. 50° 04′ E. 609.50 m. to point 9; N. 79° 35′ E. 247.65 m. to point 10; S. 7° 42′ E. 277.56 m. to point 11; S 9° 30′ W. 254.68 m. to point 12; S. 15° 15′ E. 277.79 m. to point 13; S. 9° 53′ W. 378.95 m. to point 14; S. 75°19′ W. 173.60 m. to point 15; S. 79° 59′ W. 256.96 m. to point 16, S. 63° 43′. W. 329.39 m. to point 17; S. 70° 44′ W. 320.14 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 1,368,217 square meters.

Points 1 and 14, B. L. cylinder concrete monuments; points 2, 10, 11, 12, 13, 15, 16 and 17, G. L. S. on crosses on trees; points 2, 4 and 5 old B. L. concrete monuments; point 6, old stake; point 7, edge of rock; point 8, stake; point 9, concrete monument.

Bounded on the east, southeast and southwest, by public land; on the west, by property of Maximino Cusit; and on the northwest, by Salvag Zone of Labuyan Channel.

Bearings true. Declination 0° 01′ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Ir-475.

Surveyed: May 14-15, 1940.

Approved: September 11, 1940.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila this twenty-third day of December, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the sixth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
